description_long: This is a modern, boxy bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large rectangular windows on both floors and a circular window on one side. The exterior is finished in a warm, light brown color, and the building is surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees, sunflowers, irises, and other flowering plants. The front of the bungalow has a paved driveway with two parked cars, leading to a main entrance with a single door and several windows. The upper floor appears to have an open terrace or partially enclosed space, visible through the large windows. The structure is set on a rectangular plot with a mix of hardscape and softscape elements, blending urban and natural aesthetics. The overall appearance is clean, contemporary, and inviting, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a circular side window, and lush landscaping, featuring a paved driveway and two parked cars. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with a warm brown exterior and an open upper terrace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular window, large rectangular windows, lush garden with various flowers, and both cars parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, two cars on the driveway, and palm trees flanking the building.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a focus on the large windows, extensive flower beds, and both cars visible from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a more symmetrical window layout, the main door, and palm trees on either side, with less visible landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and a circular accent window
